name: l3digitalnet-plugins
description: Curated collection of Claude Code plugins for enhanced development workflows

plugins.name: home-assistant-dev
plugins.description: Comprehensive Home Assistant integration development toolkit with 27 skills, MCP server for live HA connection, automated validation, example integrations, and project templates

plugins.name: github-repo-manager
plugins.description: Conversational GitHub repository maintenance — health auditing, wiki sync, PR triage, issue triage, security posture, dependency auditing, and community file management via PAT

plugins.name: release-pipeline
plugins.description: Interactive release pipeline: context-aware menu for quick merge, full semver release, plugin release, status checks, dry runs, and changelog preview

plugins.name: linux-sysadmin
plugins.description: Linux system administration knowledge base: 163 per-service guides covering daemons, CLI tools, and filesystems with annotated configs, cheatsheets, and a guided /sysadmin stack design workflow

plugins.name: design-assistant
plugins.description: Principled design document authoring and enforcement. /design-draft guides principles discovery and document generation. /design-review enforces principles across passes with auto-fix. Warm handoff transfers full context between commands.

plugins.name: plugin-test-harness
plugins.description: Iterative live testing framework for Claude Code plugins and MCP servers. Run a session branch, generate tests, record results, apply fixes, and iterate until convergence.

plugins.name: docs-manager
plugins.description: Documentation lifecycle management — detects changes, queues tasks silently, surfaces them for batch review at session boundaries.

plugins.name: repo-hygiene
plugins.description: Autonomous maintenance sweep for any git repository: validates .gitignore patterns, stale uncommitted changes, Claude Code plugin state, and (in plugin repos) marketplace manifests, README structure, placeholder detection, and reference integrity.

plugins.name: qt-suite
plugins.description: Qt development and testing toolkit: proactive specialist agents, 16 domain references, scaffolding commands, and headless GUI testing via Qt Pilot MCP for PySide6, PyQt6, and C++/Qt projects.

plugins.name: python-dev
plugins.description: 11 Python development skills covering async patterns, anti-patterns, type safety, testing, resilience, observability, configuration, design patterns, resource management, code style, and background jobs. Includes /python-code-review for comprehensive code audits across all domains.

plugins.name: opus-context
plugins.description: Teaches Claude Code Opus 4.6 to aggressively leverage its 1M token context window through always-on behavioral rules and deep-context planning for complex tasks.

plugins.name: test-driver
plugins.description: Teaches Claude to proactively drive thorough testing via gap analysis, convergence loops, and persistent status tracking. Framework-agnostic core with stack-specific profiles.

plugins.name: nominal
plugins.description: Structured verification routine for infrastructure changes. Three slash commands enforce a session contract: /preflight validates the environment, /postflight runs 11 verification systems, /abort executes a confirmed rollback.

plugins.name: up-docs
plugins.description: Update documentation across three layers (repo, Outline wiki, Notion) from session context. Five commands for targeted updates and comprehensive drift analysis with four-phase convergence.

plugins.name: handoff
plugins.description: Save and load task context across machines via a shared network drive. Two commands for cross-machine continuity during infrastructure work.

plugins.name: claude-sync
plugins.description: Synchronizes the Claude Code environment across multiple workstations. Two slash commands: /sync-export captures settings, MCP servers, plugins, and CLAUDE.md into a portable snapshot after syncing git repos. /sync-import applies the snapshot and syncs repos on the receiving machine.

plugins.name: qdev
plugins.description: Development quality toolkit: /research sweeps before you build; /quality-review iterates to convergence; /deps-audit checks manifests for CVEs; /doc-sync keeps inline docs aligned; /spec-update syncs spec to code.
